hypothesis: Otherwise-unmodified risk_on SPY-relative leaders with regime_exit_score < 0.08 may deserve a 2.5x risk budget because the current trade audit showed that low-score leader cohort was positive in the active late and old fixed windows.
component: quant/constants.py, quant/portfolio_engine.py, quant/test_production_parity.py (temporary patch reverted after rejection)
change_summary: Temporarily tested a shared sizing branch that lifted otherwise-unmodified SPY-relative leaders from 2.0x to 2.5x when regime_exit_score < 0.08. Entry, filters, ranking, exits, slots, add-ons, LLM/news replay, earnings, universe, and non-leader risk_on sizing were unchanged. The code was rolled back after Gate 4 failed.

parameters.single_causal_variable: otherwise-unmodified risk_on + spy_relative_leader + regime_exit_score < 0.08 risk multiplier

market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull where strategy makes money but historically lagged indexes
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with lower win rate

delta_metrics.gate4_basis: Rejected: aggregate EV delta +0.0108 and PnL delta +0.07% were far below Gate 4 materiality; Sharpe improved only +0.01 in one window, with two windows unchanged.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft-ranking data remains insufficient; this tested deterministic shared sizing alpha instead.

history_guardrails.not_repeating_breadth_confirmed_leader: This did not use IWM/SPY breadth confirmation.
history_guardrails.not_repeating_sector_confirmed_leader: This did not require same-sector confirmation.
history_guardrails.not_repeating_lifecycle_split: This did not split by trend/breakout lifecycle; it used only regime_exit_score within existing SPY-relative leaders.

rejection_reason: The low-score SPY-relative leader pocket was already mostly constrained by position sizing/capacity and only added $94.43 in the late window, with no effect in mid_weak or old_thin.
next_retry_requires: Do not retry regime_exit_score < 0.08 SPY-relative leader multipliers around 2.5x without forward evidence.
Do not use this result to justify broader SPY-relative leader multiplier increases.
A valid retry needs an orthogonal event/news or capacity-aware discriminator that changes at least two fixed windows materially.
